name: Chief Sidekick

desc.0: Every Bangboo in Roscaelifer would gladly throw themselves into danger for the Chief Technician's scientific pursuits, and this particular one is clearly the quickest to charge in headfirst.
desc.1: "Ehn-nhu nhe na, ehn-nha en-en?" (Boss Norma, is pretending a Bangboo is a W-Engine actually gonna fool anyone?)
desc.2: "Nhu-en nhe ehn na?" (And if we can't fool them, can't we just overpower them?)
desc.3: —The External Strategy Department's Chief Technician is currently employing her finest technology to remodel her favorite Bangboo sidekick.

desc2: Equip to increase Stun Agents' combat capabilities
desc3: Nhe-nha ehn ne! (Through fire and flames for Lady Norma!)
phaseDescs: The equipper's Impact increases by <ct color=#2BAD00>30</ct>, and their DMG ignores <ct color=#2BAD00>15%</ct> of the target's <ct color=#FF5521>Fire RES</ct>. When the equipper is not the active character, Energy Regen increases by <ct color=#2BAD00>0.4</ct>/s. When the equipper deals <ct color=#FF5521>Fire DMG</ct> with an <ct color=#FFFFFF>EX Special Attack</ct>, all Agents' DMG increases by <ct color=#2BAD00>12.5%</ct> for 30s, stacking up to 2 times. Repeated triggers reset the duration. This effect can trigger once per skill. Only one instance of this effect can exist in the same squad.

The equipper's Impact increases by <ct color=#2BAD00>33</ct>, and their DMG ignores <ct color=#2BAD00>17.2%</ct> of the target's <ct color=#FF5521>Fire RES</ct>. Repeated triggers reset the duration. This effect can trigger once per skill. Only one instance of this effect can exist in the same squad.
